caption: The video features a man seated at a desk in what appears to be a podcast or radio studio setting. He is wearing a black hoodie with "BOSS" written on it, a white cap, and headphones. The man is engaged in conversation, speaking into a microphone positioned in front of him. Behind him, there is a banner with the text "UNIQUE HUSTLE" and a sign that reads "Where BOSSES Talk!" along with the number "101." The environment suggests a professional yet casual atmosphere, likely focused on business or entrepreneurial topics. The man's body language indicates he is actively participating in the discussion, possibly sharing insights or answering questions.
